# Murmur

> Free, open-source offline voice dictation for macOS.

Murmur is a push-to-talk voice input app for macOS. Hold a hotkey to speak, release to insert text at your cursor. Fully offline speech recognition via SenseVoice. Native Swift app, no Electron.

## Links

- Homepage: https://murmurtype.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/hssstg/murmur
- Download: https://github.com/hssstg/murmur/releases/latest
- Changelog: https://murmurtype.com/changelog

## Features

- Offline ASR: Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, Cantonese
- Push-to-talk with customizable hotkeys and mouse buttons
- Optional LLM text polishing via OpenAI-compatible API
- Dictation history with search
- Hotword management with AI extraction
- Usage statistics dashboard
- Mouse button remapping (side button as Enter)

## Requirements

- macOS 14 Sonoma or later
- Apple Silicon or Intel Mac
- Free, MIT licensed
